members.summary: Separate: split a combined mesh into its disconnected shells (optionally per material).

members.name: tb003
members.summary: Extrude: push out the selected faces, edges, or vertices.

members.name: tb005
members.summary: Detach: extract the selected faces into a new object (optionally duplicated/separated).

members.name: b000
members.summary: Circularize: reshape the selected vertices, edges, or faces into an even circle.

members.name: b001
members.summary: Fill Holes: cap open holes bounded by the mesh's border edges.

members.name: b003
members.summary: Symmetrize: mirror topology and edits across the active symmetry axis.

members.name: b006
members.summary: Bridge: span two edge selections with new connecting faces (closes border edges).

members.name: b008
members.summary: Weld Center: merge the selected vertices to their shared center point.

members.name: b011
members.summary: Bevel: open the Bevel tool window.

members.name: b022
members.summary: Attach: connect components interactively with Maya's Connect tool.

members.name: b032
members.summary: Poke: add a center vertex to each selected face, fanning it into triangles.

members.name: b034
members.summary: Wedge: sweep the selected faces around a chosen edge into an arc.

members.name: b043
members.summary: Target Weld: interactively merge one vertex onto another by dragging.

members.name: cmb001_init
members.summary: Initializes the combo box with unit options.

members.name: cmb002_init
members.summary: Initializes the combo box with frame rate options.

members.name: s000_init
members.summary: Initialize autosave max backups spinbox (widget is source of truth).

members.name: s001_init
members.summary: Initialize autosave interval spinbox (widget is source of truth).

members.name: b008
members.summary: Hotkeys: open Maya's native Hotkey Preferences window.

members.name: tb001_init
members.summary: Render: camera, renderer, Arnold network, IPR, and smart redo.

members.name: tb001
members.summary: Render: render the current frame through the selected camera and renderer.

members.name: cmb001
members.summary: Create: create a rigging utility node — joints, IK handle, lattice, or cluster.

members.name: cmb002
members.summary: Quick Rig: open a quick-rig tool (tube, wheel, shadow, or telescope rig).

members.name: cmb002
members.summary: Autosave: reopen a recent autosaved scene file.

members.name: cmb003
members.summary: Import: import a file, or open import / FBX / OBJ preset options.

members.name: cmb004
members.summary: Export: export the selection or whole scene (FBX, Send to Unreal, etc.).

members.name: b010
members.summary: Blender Bridge — send the selection to a fresh Blender (mtk.BlenderBridge).

members.name: b016
members.summary: Unity Bridge — send the selection to a Unity project's Assets/ (mtk.UnityBridge).

members.name: tb003
members.summary: Export Scene (FBX + optional GLB) using the configured options.

members.name: tb001
members.summary: Get Scene Info — render the audit report to the viewer dialog.

members.name: b007
members.summary: Import file: import a file via Maya's Import dialog.

members.name: list000_init
members.summary: Select by Type: Hierarchical type list.

members.name: cmb003
members.summary: Convert To: convert the component selection to verts, edges, faces, UVs, or shells.

members.name: chk005_init
members.summary: Create button group for radioboxes chk005, chk006, chk007

members.name: tb000
members.summary: Select Nth: select edge loops/rings or shortest paths, stepping every Nth component.

members.name: tb002
members.summary: Select Island: Select Polygon Face Island

members.name: get_selection_tool
members.summary: Queries the current selection tool in Maya.

members.name: set_selection_tool
members.summary: Sets the selection tool in Maya.

members.name: tb001
members.summary: Reload Tentacle package with its dependencies.

members.name: b022
members.summary: UI Browser: open the tentacle UI browser (search, show/hide registered UIs).

members.name: kse_repeat_last_init
members.summary: Initialize repeat last command key sequence editor.

members.name: b001
members.summary: Triangulate: split the selected faces into triangles.

members.name: b005
members.summary: Reduce: lower the polygon count while preserving border, hard, crease, and UV edges.

members.name: tb000
members.summary: Decimate: reduce face count by quadric-error percentage or coplanar-face dissolve.

members.name: b028
members.summary: Quad Draw: enter Maya's Quad Draw retopology tool.

members.name: chk000
members.summary: Symmetry X: toggle modeling symmetry across the X axis.

members.name: chk001
members.summary: Symmetry Y: toggle modeling symmetry across the Y axis.

members.name: chk002
members.summary: Symmetry Z: toggle modeling symmetry across the Z axis.

members.name: chk004
members.summary: Symmetry: Object space (radio partner of Topo;

members.name: cmb002
members.summary: Align To: snap/align objects point-to-point, multi-point, or along a curve.

members.name: tb005
members.summary: Move To: move the selected objects onto the last-selected object (by a chosen pivot).

members.name: b001
members.summary: Match Scale: scale the selected object(s) to match the first-selected object's size.

members.name: setTransformSnap
members.summary: Set the transform tool's move, rotate, and scale snap states.

members.name: b000
members.summary: Measure: create a distance-measure tool between two points.

members.name: b001
members.summary: Annotation: create an annotation (text label) node.

members.name: get_map_size
members.summary: Get the map size from the combobox as an int.

members.name: tb001
members.summary: Auto Unwrap: automatically unwrap UVs for the selected objects.

members.name: tb004
members.summary: Unfold: relax/unfold the selected UVs to reduce stretch and distortion.

members.name: tb006
members.summary: Distribute: evenly space the selected UV shells horizontally or vertically.

members.name: cmb002
members.summary: Transform: flip or rotate the selected UVs.

members.name: b005
members.summary: Cut UVs: split the UV shell along the selected edges.

members.name: b011
members.summary: Sew UVs: stitch the selected UV edges back together.

members.summary: Initialize Cut Hard Edges option menu.

members.name: tb022
members.summary: Cut UV hard edges (always), optionally also UV borders and auto-detected seams.

members.summary: Initialize Pin/Unpin button — static pin icon, non-checkable.

members.name: b030_init
members.summary: Initialize Stack button — static stack icon, non-checkable.

modules.summary: Blender entry point for tentacle's Qt marking menu — host + keymap bridge + launcher in one.

functions.name: ensure_qapp
functions.summary: Return the process QApplication, creating one if Blender has none.

functions.name: ensure_blender_widget
functions.summary: Establish ``app.blender_widget`` — the parent for the marking menu.

functions.name: start_event_pump
functions.summary: Pump Qt events from Blender's timer loop so the Qt UI stays responsive (idempotent).

functions.name: blender_native_window
functions.summary: Blender's main GHOST window wrapped as a foreign ``QWindow`` (cached on the QApplication).

functions.name: launch
functions.summary: Stand up the Qt host and return a :class:`TclBlender` (idempotent).

functions.name: reload
functions.summary: Reload the tentacle ecosystem in place and re-register.

functions.name: diagnose
functions.summary: Return (and print) the live activation state.

functions.name: enable_click_debug
functions.summary: Turn on the opt-in click tracer.
